entries.title: API Change Log — Initial API launch
entries.description: Added documentation for the Locations API , Current Conditions API , Alerts API , Daily Indices API , Weather Alarms API , Climo API , and Legacy API. Added Weather Icons page. 12 new languages supported: Bulgarian, Croatian, Estonian, Filipino, Kazakh, Latvian, Lithuanian, Macedonian, Malaysian, Serbian, Thai, Vietnamese. Changed date format for all APIs from yyyy-mm-ddThh:mm:ss+/-hhmm to yyyy-mm-ddThh:mm:ss+/-hh:mm .

entries.title: API Change Log — Core API expansion
entries.description: Added documentation for the Tropical API , Translations API , and Imagery API . Updated CurrentConditions API to include getPhotos. Added TopCityList and CityNeighbors to the Locations API. Added EndDate and Category to Forecast API headlines output. Added Category to the Alerts API output. Severe weather alert description and last action are now translated. Added basic code samples for locations and current conditions. Added Unit Types page and metric thresholds to Alarms homepage. Added Catego

entries.title: API Change Log — MinuteCast™, forecasts, and language expansion
entries.description: Added MinuteCast™ caching information to Best Practices and Forecasts pages. Added WetBulb Temperature as a Current Conditions parameter. Added HDD/CDD as Daily Forecast parameters. Added Past 24 hour Historical Current Conditions. Updated MinuteCast™ to include standard and premium options. Added 6 new languages: Bengali, Bosnian, Icelandic, Montenegrin, Swahili, and Urdu. Added a Locations change log . Added SourceId and fully translated Summary to Alerts API output. Updated Forecasts API to i

entries.title: API Change Log — Languages, parameters, and search updates
entries.description: Added new language localizations including Gujarati, Tamil, Azerbaijani, and Uzbek. Added LocalSource parameter for Current Conditions and Daily Forecast responses. Added additional response parameters for Air Quality queries. Added toplevel query parameter for Geoposition queries. Added Time Zones menu item to Location API. Added Partner ID information to Locations API.

entries.title: API Change Log — Indices and MinuteCast™ updates
entries.description: Added metadata for indices 42-44. Added new parameters to MinuteCast™ Premium responses.

entries.title: API Change Log — Alerts update
entries.description: Added "Update" as an Alert Last Action value.

entries.title: API Change Log — Astronomy, Tidal Forecast, and Air Quality
entries.description: Added Astronomy API for sun and moon data. Added Tidal Forecast API for tide predictions. Updated International Air Quality to include Air Korea data access.

entries.title: API Change Log — Alerts and language updates
entries.description: Added definitions for lastAction parameter in Alerts response. See Alerts Action Reference . Added Kannada, Marathi, Punjabi, and Telegu to the list of available languages .

entries.title: API Change Log — Locations and Air Quality updates
entries.description: Added DataSets parameter to the Locations API. Added explanation of International Air Quality endpoints.

entries.title: API Change Log — Deep Links, Locations updates
entries.description: Added Deep Links API for direct links to AccuWeather content. Added ParentCity object to Locations API response. Added ability to filter Autocomplete Locations searches by country. Added POI Search by Geoposition to Locations API. Added Translation endpoints to the Locations API.

entries.title: API Change Log — Quick start guides
entries.description: Added Quick Start Guides for easier developer implementation.

entries.title: API Change Log — Quarter-day forecasts
entries.description: Added quarter-day forecast endpoints to the Forecasts API .

entries.title: API Change Log — AccuWeather Go
entries.description: Added AccuWeather Go endpoints for route-based weather forecasts.

entries.title: API Change Log — Indices updates
entries.description: Added flying travel index to the Indices API. Updated index categories and levels for the flight delays index.

entries.title: API Change Log — Tropical API updates
entries.description: Updated Tropical API with new endpoints. Added links to status.accuweather.com .

entries.title: API Change Log — Current Conditions and Locations updates
entries.description: Added HasPrecipitation and PrecipitationType response parameters to the Current Conditions API . Added India postal codes to the Locations API .

entries.title: API Change Log — Radar and Satellite Maps
entries.description: Added Radar Maps and Satellite Maps endpoints for weather map overlay tiles.

entries.title: API Change Log — Future Radar Maps
entries.description: Added Future Radar Maps endpoints for forecast radar overlay tiles.

entries.title: API Change Log — Air Quality API version 2
entries.description: Launched Air Quality API version 2 with expanded international coverage and pollutant details.

entries.title: API Change Log — Historical weather endpoints
entries.description: Added Historical Weather endpoints.

entries.title: API Change Log — New forecast response parameters
entries.description: Added Evapotranspiration , SolarIrradiance , RealFeelTemperatureShade , and ThunderstormProbability response parameters to hourly, daily, and quarter-day Forecasts API endpoints.

entries.title: API Change Log — RealFeel® Phrase parameter
entries.description: Added "Phrase" response parameter to all RealFeel® Forecasts and Current Conditions endpoints. See RealFeel® Phrase Reference for the full list of phrases and temperature ranges.

entries.title: API Change Log — API removals
entries.description: Removed Local Weather API and Historical Weather API.

entries.title: API Change Log — Historical API endpoints
entries.description: Added Historical API endpoints for archived weather observation data.

entries.title: API Change Log — New indices
entries.description: Added pest activity and brightness indices to the Indices API .

entries.title: What is a heat dome, and how can it create 'ring of fire' thunderstorms?
entries.description: What is a heat dome, and how can it create 'ring of fire' thunderstorms?

entries.title: API Change Log — River Gauge API and new indices
entries.description: Introduced the River Gauge API providing river water level data and flood stage information. Added new indices to the Indices API: dry skin forecast, makeup and skincare forecast, clothes drying forecast, and car washing forecast.

entries.title: Heat exhaustion vs. heatstroke: What are the warning signs and how should you react?
entries.description: Heat exhaustion vs. heatstroke: What are the warning signs and how should you react?

entries.title: API Change Log — Reports API
entries.description: Introduced the Reports API for weather summary reports including local storm reports.

entries.title: API Change Log — Climbing index added
entries.description: Added climbing index to the Indices API .

entries.title: Deadly severe weather outbreak in central US causes an estimated $9 billion to $11 billion in total damage and economic loss
entries.description:
AccuWeather® Global Weather Center – May. 19, 2025 – A multiday severe weather outbreak that produced dozens of destructive tornadoes across the central United States, including a significant tornado in parts of the St. Louis metro area, caused an estimated $9 billion to $11 billion in total damage and economic loss, according to a preliminary estimate from experts […]

The post Deadly severe weather outbreak in central US causes an estimated $9 billion to $11 billion in total damage and economic loss appeared first on Corporate | AccuWeather.

entries.title: Independence Day flash flood tragedy in Texas causes an estimated $18 billion to $22 billion in total damage and economic loss
entries.description:
AccuWeather® Global Weather Center – July 7, 2025 – Slow-moving downpours that unleashed more than a foot of rainfall along the Guadalupe River and parts of the Texas Hill Country triggered an extreme flash flood disaster over the Independence Day holiday weekend, claiming more than 80 lives and causing an estimated $18 billion to $22 billion in total […]

The post Independence Day flash flood tragedy in Texas causes an estimated $18 billion to $22 billion in total damage and economic loss appeared first on Corporate | AccuWeather.

entries.description: Introduced the Lightning API providing real-time lightning strike data. Powered by AccuWeather Lightning Network.

entries.title: 🌊 Coastal storm moving out 🟡 Tracking the next tropical wave 🌨️ First big storm of the season for California
entries.description:
The following AccuWeather updates and attached forecast graphics are cleared for use. Let us know if you’d like to set up a phone or Zoom interview today. What could the tropics have in store for the rest of October? – NEW expert quotes and updated forecast graphics are attached below Storm clearing out after slamming the East Coast […]

The post 🌊 Coastal storm moving out 🟡 Tracking the next tropical wave 🌨️ First big storm of the season for California appeared first on Corporate | AccuWeather.

entries.title: October tropical wind and rainstorm causes an estimated $3 billion in total damage and economic loss
entries.description:
AccuWeather® Global Weather Center – Oct. 14, 2025 – AccuWeather®experts say a major East Coast storm that brought widespread coastal flooding, torrential rainfall, gusty winds and beach erosion caused $3 billion in total damage and economic loss, according to a preliminary estimate. This storm, categorized as a tropical wind and rainstorm by AccuWeather® hurricane experts, brought the most […]

The post October tropical wind and rainstorm causes an estimated $3 billion in total damage and economic loss appeared first on Corporate | AccuWeather.

entries.title: AccuWeather® Climate Analysis Reveals US Flooding Events Are Significantly Increasing Despite No Apparent Change in Annual Precipitation Amount
entries.description:
AccuWeather® Global Weather Center – September 19, 2025 — AccuWeather®, recognized and documented as the most trusted source of weather forecasts and warnings with proven Superior Accuracy™, today released a new analysis of nearly 60 years of data from the AccuWeather Data Suite covering the contiguous United States. The analysis shows a striking shift in rainfall patterns: a […]

The post AccuWeather® Climate Analysis Reveals US Flooding Events Are Significantly Increasing Despite No Apparent Change in Annual Precipitation Amount appeared first on Corporate | AccuWeather.

entries.title: API Change Log — Lightning API current and historical endpoints
entries.description: Added current and historical lightning strike endpoints to the Lightning API . Current endpoints return strikes by bounding box or point and radius. Historical endpoint returns daily strike data by point and radius.

entries.title: API Change Log — AccuWeather Alerts now available in API
entries.description: Developers can now access AccuWeather's proprietary alerts in a new API endpoint. Review the Alerts API Guide and Alerts Parameters .

entries.title: API Change Log — Lightning forecast endpoint
entries.description: Added lightning probability forecasts with a new endpoint in the Lightning API . Forecasts return 10-minute interval probabilities for a 2-hour window at any latitude/longitude. Review the Lightning Guide and Lightning Parameters for details. Try the Lightning Forecast recipe for a step-by-step walkthrough.

entries.title: API Change Log — Heat index and wind chill response parameters
entries.description: Added HeatIndex to the Current Conditions response — perceived outdoor temperature in hot conditions (≥80 °F), computed via the NWS Rothfusz 9-term equation. Added HeatIndex and WindChillTemperature to the Hourly Forecast response.
